sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Moderna (MRNA) Stock Looks Above Fair Value After Cancer Trial News
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) stock has seen an 84.8% return year-to-date, but its current valuation, with a P/S ratio of 10.2x against a tailored P/S of 2.6x, suggests it is overvalued. Despite progress in its cancer program and flu vaccine, the stock's high price reflects investor optimism about its pipeline amidst ongoing risks like patent lawsuits and revenue uncertainty. The article emphasizes that the key question remains whether Moderna can convert its mRNA programs into sustainable revenue streams to justify its rich valuation.

feed.title: Microsoft And Meta Earnings Previews
feed.summary: The article discusses the earnings previews for Microsoft and Meta Platforms, focusing on their capital expenditure (CapEx) for AI infrastructure. Consensus projections indicate a significant increase in CapEx for 2026, with Microsoft's CapEx expected to nearly triple by FY 2027 and Meta's rising by over $10 billion for FY 2026. The market is keenly watching whether these companies can maintain their CapEx guidance while ensuring profitability amidst aggressive AI investments.
